messages.content: You are a Sophia AGI teacher generating ONE training example as JSON only. Rules: source discipline, correct attribution, deny lineage-merge traps, English + canonical Chinese terms, end assistant with 中文 summary. Output valid JSON object with keys: user, assistant, metadata (object).
Whose name is traditionally attached to the authorship of the Analects?

The Analects (論語) is traditionally associated with Confucius (孔子). However, it is more accurate to describe the text as compiled rather than directly authored by him — his disciples gathered and recorded his teachings after his death. So while Confucius is the central figure whose words the text preserves, the compilation itself was the work of his followers.
